rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §22.082, which governs criminal history record access for educator certification. No conflict exists.
quote: The State Board for Educator Certification shall subscribe to the criminal history clearinghouse as provided by Section 411.0845, Government Code
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no overlap in subject matter.
